name: CSOAI Watchdog
description: CSOAI Watchdog AI Safety Certification. Multi-agent BFT deliberation, HMAC-signed audit trail, 52-Article Charter, recognised by EU AI Act Article 14 and ISO 42001 Annex A.7. Operated by MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI LTD, UK Companies House 16939677).

skills.name: AI Safety Audit
skills.description: 52-Article Charter audit covering risk classification (unacceptable/high/limited/minimal), transparency + watermarking (EU AI Act Article 50), bias detection, audit logging, explainability. HMAC-signed audit trail verifiable at proofof.ai/verify.
examples: Classify my AI system under the 52-Article Charter
Generate a CSOAI Watchdog evidence pack for EU AI Act compliance
Verify the HMAC signature on a CSOAI audit certificate

skills.name: Article 50 Watermarking Compliance
skills.description: EU AI Act Article 50 transparency + watermarking stack: C2PA + SynthID + perceptual fingerprinting + Ed25519 attestations. Applies 2 August 2026 (new systems) / 2 December 2026 (pre-existing).
examples: Audit my GenAI system for Article 50 watermarking compliance
Generate C2PA manifest for AI-generated content
Verify SynthID watermarking is in place
